creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yonas Yanfa from comment #2)

> deno doesn't show up under `pkg search deno`.
Hmm, on my box I get:

#pkg search deno
deno-1.45.2_1                  Secure JavaScript and TypeScript runtime
deno-dom-0.1.47_1              Deno: Browser DOM & HTML parser plugin
denominator-4.7.1              Portably control DNS clouds
speech-denoiser-lv2-g20181007_1 Speech denoise LV2 plugin based on RNNoise library



And I just successfully built deno-1.46.2 on a recent (latest) FreeBSD 14.1 amd64 on Poudriere.
